article_meta.title: News Law & the Courts Black Lives Matter Director Spent Millions in Donations on Homes, Shopping, Vacations, Indictment

reasoning: No attribution violations and some genuine bias identified, but several clear biased phrasings in the author’s prose were missed and the bias type labels used are not from the allowed set.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged items come from author prose/headline; no quoted or attributed source language was flagged.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Flagged items are broadly defensible (loaded generalization sentence, headline framing, and an omission critique). One item (omission) is more debatable but still within reasonable bias analysis.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed multiple clear author-level loaded phrases such as 'personal indulgences,' 'supplement her lifestyle,' 'shopping sprees,' and the subjective 'only one third' framing.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-listed labels ('Framing bias', 'Selection and omission bias', 'Labeling bias') instead of allowed types like Spin, Slant, Word Choice, or Bias by Omission.
